**Title (Titolo):** Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals EU Size 36.5
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** Luxury Intrecciato Woven Sandals
**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):** Exquisite Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals in EU Size 36.5, featuring the iconic Intrecciato woven design.
**Description (Descrizione):** These Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals are a masterpiece of Italian craftsmanship, showcasing the brand's signature Intrecciato woven technique. Crafted from high-quality nappa leather, these sandals are not only visually stunning but also incredibly comfortable. The intricate weaving pattern adds a touch of sophistication and elegance, making them perfect for formal occasions. The EU Size 36.5 ensures a precise fit, and the overall design exudes luxury and refinement.
